# browsedDeviceTypeMask

**Instance Property**

A mask whose set bits indicate the type of devices being browsed after the delegate receives the start message.

## Declaration

```swift
var browsedDeviceTypeMask: ICDeviceTypeMask { get set }
```

## Discussion

Construct this property by performing bitwise OR on values of [doc://com.apple.imagecapturecore/documentation/ImageCaptureCore/ICDeviceTypeMask] with values of [doc://com.apple.imagecapturecore/documentation/ImageCaptureCore/ICDeviceLocationTypeMask]. You can change this property while the browser is looking for devices.

## Browsing Devices

- **isBrowsing**: A Boolean value indicating whether the device browser is browsing for devices.
- **devices**: All devices found by the browser.
- **ICDevice**: An abstract object that represents a device.
- **start()**: Tells the delegate to start looking for devices.
- **stop()**: Tells the delegate to stop looking for devices.
